name: Loans In KC
description_short: Kansas City residential mortgage broker that shops multiple lenders via a single application and soft credit pull to find competitive home purchase and refinance rates.
description_long:
Loans In KC, LLC is a residential mortgage brokerage headquartered at 7400 Wornall, Suite A, Kansas City, MO 64114, with a secondary office in Prairie Village, KS. The firm is operated by principal owner David Conderman and loan officer Bob Ludwikoski, who holds NMLS license #1941280 and has been active in mortgage origination since at least 2019. The company is licensed under NMLS and operates primarily across the Kansas City metro area, serving both Missouri and Kansas borrowers. A BBB business profile exists for the company under the Mortgage Broker category, though the exact rating and accreditation status were not confirmed at time of writing.

Loans In KC offers residential mortgage products including home purchase loans, rate-and-term refinancing, cash-out refinancing, and FHA loans. Additional product types such as VA, conventional, and USDA loans are commonly offered by brokers of this type but were not explicitly confirmed on their website. Because they operate as a broker rather than a direct lender, they do not fund loans from a single source — instead, they submit a borrower's application to a network of wholesale lenders and present the most competitive options. An online application portal is available at loansinkc.com/apply/.

The firm's primary differentiator is its broker model: borrowers complete one application and undergo one soft credit pull to access multiple lender options simultaneously. This approach is positioned as a way to minimize the credit inquiry impact typically associated with rate shopping while still delivering competitive pricing. The team brings a background that spans retirement planning, insurance, and personal finance — giving the operation a financial planning orientation beyond pure transaction processing. The 5.0-star Google rating from 63 reviews suggests a strong client experience track record within the local market.

Loans In KC is a solid option for Kansas City-area borrowers who want a local, relationship-focused broker to do the rate-shopping legwork rather than applying to multiple lenders directly. The main limitations are geographic — they serve the KC metro and are not a national lender — and their product line, while appropriate for most residential scenarios, has not been fully documented publicly. Pricing is not published in advance, which is standard for mortgage brokers but means borrowers cannot comparison shop fees without going through initial contact. No money-back guarantee or pricing tiers exist, consistent with the industry norm.

As a financial institution, this lender competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders in the consumer lending space. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths to improvement. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing visibility into credit health, and credit counseling through nonprofit agencies can help consumers create sustainable budgeting plans. Many of these lenders offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments over 12 to 60 months, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
address: 4200 Somerset Dr Ste 131, Prairie Village, KS 66208
pros: Single application and one soft credit pull to access multiple wholesale lenders simultaneously
Broker model means they shop competing lenders on the borrower's behalf rather than pushing a single in-house product
5.0-star Google rating from 63 reviews indicates strong local client satisfaction
Loan officer Bob Ludwikoski (NMLS# 1941280) brings multi-year origination experience in the KC market
Online application portal available at loansinkc.com/apply/ for remote starts
Team background in retirement planning and personal finance adds broader financial context to mortgage guidance
Two office locations — Kansas City, MO and Prairie Village, KS — serve both sides of the state line
cons: Serves only the Kansas City metro area — not available to borrowers outside the local market
Rates and fees are not published; borrowers must initiate contact to receive any pricing information
Founded year and full NMLS company license details not publicly confirmed
No dedicated mobile app confirmed — digital access limited to web portal
BBB rating not confirmed despite an existing profile — accreditation status unknown
best_for: Kansas City-area first-time home buyers who want a local broker to navigate lender options
KC metro homeowners exploring rate-and-term or cash-out refinancing
Borrowers who want to minimize credit inquiry impact while still comparing multiple lender offers
Clients who prefer working with a small local firm over a large national mortgage bank
diagnosis: Loans In KC is best suited for Kansas City metro borrowers who want a local mortgage broker to shop wholesale lender networks on their behalf, particularly those buying a home or refinancing who value a single point of contact and a soft-pull rate comparison process. The main caveat is geographic — this is a local Kansas City firm, not a national lender, and borrowers outside the KC area will need to look elsewhere.
services: Multi-lender rate shopping via single application
Single soft credit pull for lender comparison
Client education and communication throughout the loan process
meta_description: Kansas City mortgage broker that shops multiple lenders for competitive home purchase rates.
